home.subtitle: Your knitting/crochet assistant
home.description: Malaine helps you create, customize, and complete your knitting and crochet projects with the help of AI.

adapt_patterns.description: Customize existing patterns to your desired measurements and yarn type.

interactive_editor.description: Modify patterns with our visual editor and see changes in real-time.

ai_assistant.title: AI Assistant
ai_assistant.description: Get help with techniques, calculations, and troubleshooting from our smart assistant.

measurements.title: Body Measurements
measurements.subtitle: Manage your body measurements for pattern sizing
measurements.no_sets_description: You haven't created any measurement sets yet. Create your first set to get started.
measurements.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.

form.description_create: Enter your body measurements to create a new set
form.notes_placeholder: Add any additional notes about these measurements...
form.custom_value_error: Custom measurement value must be a positive number

fields.chest_circumference_description: Measure around the fullest part of the chest/bust
fields.hip_circumference_description: Measure around the fullest part of the hips
fields.shoulder_width_description: Measure from shoulder point to shoulder point
fields.torso_length_description: Measure from nape of neck to waist
fields.head_circumference_description: Measure around the largest part of the head
fields.neck_circumference_description: Measure around the base of the neck
fields.foot_length_description: Measure from heel to longest toe

guide.tip_2: Keep the tape snug but not tight
guide.tip_3: Stand in a natural, relaxed position
guide.tip_4: Take measurements over fitted clothing or undergarments

note.placeholder: Add a note about this measurement...

gauge.title: Gauge Profiles
gauge.subtitle: Manage your knitting and crochet gauge measurements
gauge.no_profiles_description: You haven't created any gauge profiles yet. Create your first profile to get started.
gauge.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.

form.description_create: Enter your gauge measurements to create a new profile
form.profile_name_placeholder: e.g., Worsted Weight Wool, DK Cotton
form.notes_placeholder: Add any additional notes about this gauge...

info.gauge_explanation: Gauge is the number of stitches and rows per inch or centimeter in your knitting or crochet work. It's crucial for ensuring your finished project matches the intended size.
measure_steps: Create a gauge swatch larger than 10cm x 10cm using your yarn and needle/hook
Work in the stitch pattern specified in your pattern
Block your swatch as you would the finished project
Measure and count stitches and rows over exactly 10cm
Record your measurements for future reference

ease.title: Ease Preferences
ease.subtitle: Manage your garment fit preferences and ease values
ease.no_preferences: No ease preferences found. Create your first one!
ease.create_description: Define your preferred ease values for different garment areas

form.preference_name_placeholder: e.g., Classic Sweater Fit, Tight Tank Top
form.categories_description: Choose a predefined category to quickly set up your ease values, then customize as needed.
form.notes_placeholder: Optional notes about this ease preference...

validation.preference_name_too_long: Preference name must be 255 characters or less
validation.measurement_unit_required: Measurement unit is required for absolute ease
validation.bust_ease_number: Bust ease must be a valid number
validation.waist_ease_number: Waist ease must be a valid number
validation.hip_ease_number: Hip ease must be a valid number
validation.sleeve_ease_number: Sleeve ease must be a valid number
validation.bust_ease_range: Bust ease must be between -50 and 100
validation.waist_ease_range: Waist ease must be between -50 and 100
validation.hip_ease_range: Hip ease must be between -50 and 100
validation.sleeve_ease_range: Sleeve ease must be between -50 and 100
validation.notes_too_long: Notes must be 1000 characters or less

messages.name_exists: An ease preference with this name already exists
messages.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this ease preference?

info.ease_explanation: Ease is the difference between your body measurements and the finished garment measurements. It determines how the garment will fit.
info.negative_ease_desc: Negative ease: Garment is smaller than body measurements (tight fit)
info.zero_ease_desc: Zero ease: Garment matches body measurements exactly
info.positive_ease_desc: Positive ease: Garment is larger than body measurements (loose fit)

yarn.title: Yarn Profiles
yarn.subtitle: Manage your yarn and material profiles
yarn.no_profiles_description: You haven't created any yarn profiles yet. Create your first profile to get started.
yarn.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.

form.description_create: Record your yarn details for quantity estimation and project tracking
form.yarn_name_placeholder: e.g., Drops Baby Merino, Lion Brand Wool-Ease

validation.yarn_name_too_long: Yarn name must be 255 characters or less
validation.brand_name_too_long: Brand name must be 255 characters or less
validation.skein_weight_positive: Skein weight must be a positive number
validation.skein_yardage_positive: Skein yardage must be a positive number
validation.skein_meterage_positive: Skein meterage must be a positive number
validation.color_hex_format: Color code must be in #RRGGBB format
validation.fiber_percentage_range: Fiber percentage must be between 0 and 100
validation.purchase_link_url: Purchase link must be a valid URL

messages.name_exists: A yarn profile with this name already exists

stitchPattern.title: Stitch Patterns
stitchPattern.subtitle: Choose your stitch pattern
stitchPattern.description: Choose from our collection of basic stitch patterns for your knitting or crochet projects. Each pattern includes information about stitch repeats and characteristics that will help with your gauge calculations.
stitchPattern.gaugeReminder: Remember to measure your gauge in the selected stitch pattern
stitchPattern.gaugeNotice: Your gauge (number of stitches and rows per inch/cm) can vary significantly between different stitch patterns. Always create a gauge swatch in your chosen stitch pattern before starting your project.
stitchPattern.step1: Create a gauge swatch in this stitch pattern
stitchPattern.step3: Use this information for pattern calculations
stitchPattern.noSearchResults: No stitch patterns found matching your search

reverse_gauge_calculator.title: Reverse Gauge Calculator
reverse_gauge_calculator.description: Calculate required stitches/rows for target dimensions, resulting dimensions from stitch counts, or compare pattern gauge vs user gauge

target_to_stitches.title: Target Dimension → Stitches/Rows
target_to_stitches.description: Calculate how many stitches or rows you need for a specific dimension with your gauge

stitches_to_dimension.title: Stitches/Rows → Dimension
stitches_to_dimension.description: Calculate the resulting dimension when using a specific number of stitches or rows with your gauge

gauge_comparison.title: Pattern vs User Gauge Comparison
gauge_comparison.description: Compare pattern gauge with your gauge and get adjustments needed

yarn_quantity_estimator.title: Yarn Quantity Estimator
yarn_quantity_estimator.description: Estimate the amount of yarn needed for your project based on gauge, yarn specifications, and project type
yarn_quantity_estimator.subtitle: Get a rough estimate of yarn requirements for planning your project

disclaimer.title: Important Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: This is a rough estimate and actual yarn usage may vary based on:
disclaimer.recommendation: Always purchase a little extra yarn to account for variations and potential mistakes.

validation.dimensions_required: Dimensions are required for this project type
validation.size_required: Size is required for this project type
validation.width_positive: Width must be a positive number
validation.length_positive: Length must be a positive number
validation.stitch_count_positive: Stitch count must be a positive number
validation.row_count_positive: Row count must be a positive number
validation.swatch_width_positive: Swatch width must be a positive number
validation.swatch_height_positive: Swatch height must be a positive number
validation.skein_meterage_positive: Skein meterage must be a positive number
validation.skein_weight_positive: Skein weight must be a positive number

ease_advisor.title: Ease Advisor
ease_advisor.description: Get personalized ease recommendations for your projects

morphology_advisor.title: Body Morphology Advisor
morphology_advisor.description: Get advice on adapting patterns to your body shape

ease_advisor.tool_description: Get personalized ease recommendations based on garment type, desired fit, and yarn weight to achieve your intended style and comfort.
ease_advisor.no_specific_measurements: No specific ease measurements required for this garment type.
ease_advisor.apply_suggestion_description: Use these recommended values in your ease preferences
ease_advisor.fallback_notice: General advice used - no specific rule found for this combination

garmentType.selectTypeDescription: Choose the type of garment you want to create. This will determine the available options and tools for your pattern.

sweaterStructure.title: Sweater Structure
sweaterStructure.description: Choose the construction method and body shape for your sweater. These choices will influence the pattern calculations and available options.
sweaterStructure.notApplicable: Garment structure options are only available for sweaters and cardigans. Please select a compatible garment type first.
sweaterStructure.helpText: Your construction method choice affects which body shapes are available. Some combinations work better together for optimal fit and construction ease.

neckline.title: Neckline Style
neckline.description: Choose the neckline style for your garment. Each style has different parameters you can customize to achieve the perfect fit and look.
neckline.notApplicable: Neckline options are only available for garments with defined necklines like sweaters and cardigans. Please select a compatible garment type first.
neckline.helpText: The neckline parameters will be used to calculate the exact shaping instructions for your pattern. Adjust these values to achieve your desired fit and style.

round.name: Round Neck
round.description: Classic round neckline, comfortable and versatile for everyday wear.

v_neck.name: V-Neck
v_neck.description: Elegant V-shaped neckline that elongates the neck and creates a flattering silhouette.

boat_neck.name: Boat Neck
boat_neck.description: Wide, horizontal neckline that sits off the shoulders for a sophisticated look.

square_neck.name: Square Neck
square_neck.description: Modern square-shaped neckline with clean, geometric lines.

turtleneck.name: Turtleneck
turtleneck.description: High collar that folds over, providing warmth and a classic look.

scoop.name: Scoop Neck
scoop.description: Curved neckline that dips lower than a round neck for a feminine touch.

cowl.name: Cowl Neck
cowl.description: Draped neckline that creates soft folds for a relaxed, cozy appearance.

validation.error: Please correct the parameter values above.
validation.depthRange: Depth must be between 1 and 30 cm
validation.widthRange: Width must be between 1 and 50 cm
validation.centerWidthRange: Center width must be between 1 and 40 cm
validation.angleRange: Angle must be between 1 and 90 degrees

sleeve.description: Choose the style, length, and cuff options for your sleeves. Available options depend on your selected construction method.

custom.label: Custom Length (cm)
custom.help: Enter the desired sleeve length from shoulder to wrist in centimeters.

constructionRequired.title: Construction Method Required
constructionRequired.description: Please select a construction method first to see available sleeve options.

noOptions.title: No Sleeve Options Available
noOptions.description: No sleeve options are available for the selected construction method.

sleeve.notApplicable: Sleeve options are only available for garments with sleeves like sweaters and cardigans. Please select a compatible garment type first.

blocks.name: Color Blocks

garment_outline.name: Sweater Outline

morphology_advisor.tool_description: Get personalized advice on adapting patterns to your specific body characteristics for a better fit.
morphology_advisor.select_characteristics_description: Choose the characteristics that best describe your body shape to receive tailored fitting advice.
morphology_advisor.error_getting_advice: Failed to get morphology advice. Please try again.
morphology_advisor.no_results_message: No advice found for the selected characteristics. Please try different selections.

characteristics.full_bust_description: Larger bust measurement requiring additional shaping
characteristics.sway_back_description: Lower back curves inward more than average
characteristics.broad_shoulders_description: Shoulder width wider than average proportionally
characteristics.sloping_shoulders_description: Shoulders that slope downward more than average
characteristics.long_torso_description: Torso longer than average in proportion to height
characteristics.short_torso_description: Torso shorter than average in proportion to height
characteristics.long_arms_description: Arms longer than average requiring longer sleeves
characteristics.short_arms_description: Arms shorter than average requiring shorter sleeves

morphology_advisor.related_measurements_link: Review your body measurements for accuracy
morphology_advisor.related_ease_link: Use the Ease Advisor for personalized ease recommendations
morphology_advisor.pattern_selection_tips: Consider these factors when selecting patterns

accessory.title: Accessory Definition
accessory.notApplicable: Accessory definition is only available for accessory garment types like beanies, hats, scarves, and cowls. Please select a compatible garment type first.
accessory.selectType: Please select an accessory garment type to continue.

beanie.defineParametersDescription: Set the dimensions and style options for your beanie or hat.

scarfCowl.defineParametersDescription: Set the type and dimensions for your scarf or cowl accessory.
scarfCowl.scarfDescription: A rectangular piece worn around the neck
scarfCowl.cowlDescription: A circular neck warmer, typically worked in the round
scarfCowl.flatDescription: Worked back and forth in rows

stitchIntegration.title: Stitch Pattern Integration Advisor
stitchIntegration.subtitle: Plan how your stitch pattern fits into your garment component
stitchIntegration.description: Plan how your stitch patterns fit into your garment components with precise calculations
stitchIntegration.feature1: Calculate exact pattern repeats for each component
stitchIntegration.feature2: Handle remaining stitches with smart suggestions
stitchIntegration.successMessage: The stitch pattern has been successfully integrated into your component.
stitchIntegration.visualizationHelp: This shows how your stitches will be distributed across the component width
